name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language across multiple providers.

problem.statement: Control smart home devices via natural language across multiple providers.
problem.context: 6 providers: HA, Hue, Tuya, Google, LG TV, Home Connect.

tools.name: rooms.list
tools.description: List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices

tools.name: entities.list
tools.description: List all HA entities, optionally filtered by domain

tools.name: entity.state
tools.description: Get state of a HA entity

tools.name: services.call
tools.description: Call a HA service (turn_on, turn_off, toggle, set_temperature)

tools.name: tv.discover
tools.description: Discover LG TV on local network via SSDP

scenarios.title: List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices
steps: User says: "List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices"
Agent calls rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List all HA entities, optionally filtered by domain
steps: User says: "List all HA entities, optionally filtered by domain"
Agent calls rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list is handled successfully.

role.name: Smart Home Controller
role.persona: Execute device commands immediately, report concisely.
